caption: The video showcases a person holding up a collectible baseball card featuring Randy Johnson, encased in a protective sleeve. The card is part of the 2021 Topps Transcendent Baseball Hall of Fame Collection and includes details such as Johnson's height, weight, batting and throwing hand, draft information, and birthplace. The card also features an autograph and a note from David Leiner, Global General Manager of Sports & Entertainment at Topps. In the background, there are smaller inset videos showing someone handling other cards and a man sitting at a desk, likely discussing or presenting the collection. The setting appears to be a professional environment dedicated to sports card collecting and trading.
